calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Apr-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: There being no appearance, nor an objection filed, the court adopts tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF FCNB-CLIFFORD Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. The claim of exemtion is GRANTED, subject to payment by defendant of $162.00 per pay period. Order signed in open court. Judge: James Watson, Judge Pro Tem. Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos. Proceedings not reported. (302)
